name: arkadas-erp
description: Arkadaş Özel Eğitim ve Rehabilitasyon Merkezi - ERP Sistemi

scripts.dev: npm run dev:docker && turbo run dev
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:docker && turbo run dev
scripts.dev:docker: infisical run --path / -- docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile core --profile infra up -d --wait
scripts.dev:strapi: infisical run --path /strapi -- npm run develop --prefix strapi
scripts.dev:web: infisical run --path /web -- npm run dev --prefix web
scripts.dev:mobile: cd mobile && infisical run --path /mobile -- EXPO_ROUTER_APP_ROOT=./app npx expo start --port 8082
scripts.dev:mobile-spawn: ghostty -e bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh; cd mobile && infisical run --path /mobile -- nvm install && nvm use && rm -rf .expo && EXPO_ROUTER_APP_ROOT=$(pwd)/app npx expo start --clear --port 8082; exec bash' > /dev/null 2>&1 &
scripts.dev:ai: cd ai-service && infisical run --path /ai-service -- ./venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:mebbis: infisical run --path /mebbis-service -- npm run dev --prefix mebbis-service
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:mebbis" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.build:strapi: infisical run --path /strapi -- npm run build --prefix strapi
scripts.build:web: infisical run --path /web -- npm run build --prefix web
scripts.build:mobile: cd mobile && eas build --platform all --profile production --local
scripts.build:ai: echo 'AI Service: No build step required (Python)'
scripts.start:all: npm run start:docker && concurrently --kill-others --kill-signal SIGTERM -n strapi,web,mebbis,ai -c blue,green,cyan,yellow "npm run start:strapi" "npm run start:web" "npm run start:mebbis" "npm run start:ai"
scripts.start:strapi: infisical run --path /strapi -- npm run start --prefix strapi
scripts.start:web: infisical run --path /web -- npm run start --prefix web
scripts.start:mebbis: infisical run --path /mebbis-service -- npm run start --prefix mebbis-service
scripts.start:mobile: cd mobile && infisical run --path /mobile -- EXPO_ROUTER_APP_ROOT=./app npx expo start --no-dev --minify
scripts.start:docker: infisical run --path / -- docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile core --profile features up -d
scripts.stop:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml --profile "*" down --remove-orphans && npx kill-port 3000 1337 4000 8000 8001 8080 8082 8081
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:ai && npm run install:mebbis:deps && npm run install:docs && docker compose pull
scripts.install:ai: cd ai-service && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:mebbis:deps: cd mebbis-service && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.install:docs: pipx install mkdocs-material || pip install --user mkdocs-material --break-system-packages

author: Arkadaş Özel Eğitim
